_template_description.purpose: Structured evidence record for AI-generated scientific outputs.

generated_by.system_name: Name of the system or application
generated_by.model_or_agent_stack: Optional description of the model or orchestration stack

subject.entity_type: gene | protein | disease | paper | material | molecule | target | experiment

claims.claim_type: summary | classification | observation | mechanism | comparison | hypothesis
claims.claim_text: Single scientific statement that can be inspected independently.

evidence.source_name: Name of the source system or publication
evidence.retrieval_path: URL, accession identifier, DOI, or reproducible retrieval path
evidence.quoted_or_structured_evidence: Short evidence excerpt or structured summary

verification.verifier_notes: Short explanation of the review result
